title: Types of business entity
summary: 9706 — sole traders, partnerships, limited companies, and accounting implications.
learningObjectives: Compare sole trader, partnership, and limited company structures.
Explain advantages and disadvantages of each entity type.
Outline ownership, liability, and finance differences.
Relate entity type to financial reporting requirements.

simpleExplanation.title: Who owns the business?
simpleExplanation.summary: Entity type determines who owns assets, who is liable for debts, and what financial statements must be prepared.
steps: Sole trader — one owner, unlimited liability.

sections.content: **Business entities** (1.1.1) opens 9706 Paper 2. Link **structure → accounts prepared**.
